app.name: Visual Capture for Grok
brand.name: Capture
nav.urlPlaceholder: Enter URL and press Return — e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5173
actions.viewportTitle: Lock the website CSS viewport independently of the pane width
actions.startGrokTitleIdle: Request Grok to start in the left terminal
actions.startGrokTitleReady: Grok readiness was reported by the terminal runtime
actions.startGrokTitleRequested: Launch was requested. Confirm the Grok prompt on the left; Reset term to start over.
actions.aimTitle: Aim (⌘⇧A) — capture image + DOM context for Grok
actions.frameModeTarget: Capture the selected target with surrounding context
actions.resendEmpty: Nothing captured yet — Aim or Frame first
actions.busyTitle: Capture in progress — wait a moment
status.busy: Busy — capture in flight · Aim / Frame / Re-send paused
status.aimingWithGrok: Aiming — click a node on the right · Esc cancels · image + DOM paste will be attempted in Grok
status.aimingNoGrok: Aiming — click a node on the right · Esc cancels · Grok is not running, so the capture will stay on the clipboard
status.setup4: Aim, then write the change in Grok
status.previewHint: · is the page running? Try Go / ⌘R
status.staleTargetTitle: This target belongs to a previous page; Re-send keeps its old screenshot, while a new Frame uses the current viewport.
status.ptyOnTitle: PTY process is alive; the adjacent badge reports whether it is Grok
status.grokReadyTitle: The terminal runtime explicitly reported Grok ready
status.grokRequestedTitle: Launch was requested; confirm the Grok prompt on the left
status.chooseFolder: Choose Folder to anchor edits to your project
pane.terminalHint: type change here · ⌘R reloads preview only
term.deliverHint: Aim / Frame / Re-send go to this active terminal tab
term.closeGrokDetail: Closing “{tab}” will stop Grok in that tab only. Other terminals stay open. Unfinished work may be lost.
term.keepOne: Keep at least one terminal tab
pane.expandTitle: Show website preview and URL bar
pane.splitterTitle: Drag, or use Left/Right arrows to resize panes
toast.staleTargetFrame: The target belongs to an earlier page, so Frame will capture the full viewport.
toast.noTargetFrame: No target is selected, so Frame will capture the full viewport.
toast.shellOffCopy: Shell is off; the capture will be copied for manual paste.
toast.nothingResend: Nothing to re-send — Aim at an element or grab a Frame first.
toast.folderCanceled: Folder change canceled — Grok session kept
toast.grokAlready: Grok launch was already requested; check the left terminal.
toast.grokStarted: Grok started — Aim when the prompt is ready
toast.grokLaunching: Launching Grok — Aim when the prompt is ready
toast.shellRestarted: Shell restarted — launch Grok when ready
delivery.imageDom: Image + DOM paste attempted; confirm the image chip in Grok.
delivery.domOnly: DOM/context paste attempted; confirm it in the Grok prompt.
delivery.clipboard: Copied to clipboard; it was not confirmed in Grok.
delivery.local: Capture saved locally; delivery was not confirmed.
delivery.previous: Previous capture loaded; delivery state is unknown.
status.shellOnTitle: Embedded shell/PTY is alive (not the same as Grok ready)
toast.busyShortcut: Capture in progress — wait a moment
main.busy: Capture in progress — wait a moment.
main.shellNoGrok: Shell is running, but Grok is not — copied text+image. Start Grok, then click Re-send (or paste with ⌘V).
main.termOff: Terminal not running — copied text+image. Start Grok, then click Re-send (or paste with ⌘V).
main.imageAttempted: Attempted image paste + DOM text write. Grok readiness and image attachment are unconfirmed — verify the prompt before submitting.
main.textImageClip: DOM text was written to the shell; Grok readiness is unknown. The image is on the clipboard — press ⌘V if needed.
main.textOnly: DOM context was written to the shell. Grok readiness and receipt are unconfirmed — verify the prompt before submitting.
main.pasteFailed: Could not paste into terminal — text+image copied. Focus Grok and press ⌘V.
main.imagePrepFailedManual: Could not put the capture image on the clipboard — no image paste was sent to Grok. Try Aim/Frame again, or copy the image from the capture folder and press ⌘V.
main.imagePrepFailedTextOk: DOM text was written to Grok’s shell, but the capture image never reached the clipboard — no image paste key was sent. Press ⌘V only if you place an image on the clipboard yourself.
main.imageWantedNoInject: Capture image was prepared, but no image paste key was injected. Press ⌘V in Grok if the image is still on the clipboard.
main.aimBusy: Capture in progress — wait a moment.
main.pickWarningNoGrok: Terminal not running. You can still Aim (clipboard), but Start Grok first for auto-send.
main.pickWarningNoPreview: Preview is not ready — open a loaded http(s) page first.
main.nothingResend: Nothing to re-send — Aim or Frame first
welcome.title: Visual Capture for Grok — Welcome
welcome.heading: Capture a UI, send it to Grok
welcome.body: Left pane runs native Grok. Right pane previews your site. Aim or Frame, then type the change only in Grok.
welcome.step1: Choose a project Folder (Grok working directory).
welcome.step2: Click Start Grok and wait for the prompt.
welcome.step3: Enter your site URL and press Go.
welcome.step4: Aim an element or Frame the view, then write your request in Grok.
welcome.footer: ⌘R reloads the preview only · Esc cancels Aim · ⌘⇧A / ⌘⇧F / ⌘⇧V
error.grokMissing: Grok CLI was not found on this Mac.
error.busy: A capture is already in progress.
error.invalidUrl: Only http(s) preview URLs are supported.
error.next.preview: Next: enter a running site URL and press Go (or ⌘R).
error.next.grokInstall: Next: install Grok Build CLI or set GROK_PATH to the binary.
error.next.grokLaunch: Next: click Reset term, then Start Grok again.
error.next.terminal: Next: run npm run rebuild in the project, or reinstall the app.
error.next.captureFirst: Next: Aim an element or Frame the preview first.
error.next.wait: Next: wait a moment, then try again.
error.next.url: Next: use an address starting with http:// or https://.
error.next.capture: Next: wait for the page to finish loading, then Aim or Frame again.
error.next.generic: Next: check the status strip, then retry the last action.
verify.needsAim: Verify needs an earlier Aim capture on this page.
verify.sent: Before / After paste attempted in Grok; confirm both image chips.
verify.targetMissing: The original target is no longer present.
verify.noTrackedChangeDetail: No tracked DOM, geometry, or style changes detected.
privacy.privateTitle: Use an in-memory preview session and do not save URL history
privacy.privateOnToast: Private preview on — URL history will not be saved.
privacy.privateOffToast: Private preview off — persistent site data is enabled.
privacy.clearTitle: Clear preview cookies, storage, cache, and authentication data
privacy.clearConfirm: Clear all embedded preview site data and reload the page?
privacy.downloadBlockedMessage: Downloads are disabled in the embedded preview.
privacy.downloadBlockedDetail: Open the page in your regular browser if you need to download a file.
diagnostics.title: Copy privacy-safe diagnostics
updates.title: Open the latest release page
quit.detail: Closing Capture stops Grok in every terminal tab. Unfinished work in Grok may be lost.
settings.title: Settings
settings.notifyOnGrokExit: Notify when session exits while unfocused
settings.notifyOnLongTask: Notify when long capture/deliver finishes while unfocused
palette.title: Command palette
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.urlEnter: URL bar: Enter go · Shift+Enter ignored (single-line)
shortcuts.grokNewline: Grok prompt: Shift+Enter or Alt+Enter = newline · Enter = send
shortcuts.grokClearLine: Grok prompt: ⌘⌫ = delete to line start · ⌘⌦ = delete to line end
shortcuts.grokSelectAll: Grok prompt: ⌘A = select all in composer
shortcuts.grokWordNav: Grok prompt: ⌥←/→ word hop · ⌥⌫/⌦ delete word
shortcuts.maximize: Maximize terminal (⌘⇧M) / preview (⌘⇧E); press again to restore
pane.maximizeTerminalTitle: Maximize terminal pane (Wave-style); press again to restore
pane.maximizePreviewTitle: Maximize preview pane; press again to restore
term.renameHint: Double-click to rename · drag to reorder
